title: bidens riedelii
intro: Bidens riedelii, also known as the Bidens or Riedel's beggarticks, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. The health benefits of Bidens riedelii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems, among others. Bidens riedelii is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is commonly used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
